_comment: Example smoke-test catalog for the ai-smoketest action. Each test POSTs a prompt to the agent's Responses endpoint and asserts case-insensitive substring rules on the reply. Threading: use `save_response_id_as` on one turn and `use_previous_response_id` on a later turn to chain replies; use `create_conversation_as` + `use_conversation` to bind turns to a platform-managed conversation resource. Replace these prompts and assertions with rules specific to your agent's system prompt.

tests.description: Agent returns a non-empty, in-domain answer.
tests.prompt: Say hello and tell me what you can help with.

tests.description: First turn of a multi-turn conversation; saves the response id for turn 2.
tests.prompt: My favourite colour is blue. Remember that.

tests.description: Second turn using previous_response_id; the agent must recall the colour from turn 1.
tests.prompt: What did I just tell you my favourite colour was?
